description: Set up the environment: install dependencies, create a new branch, verify baseline typecheck and build pass before making changes.
steps: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/OSAI/osai-web && npm install` to ensure all dependencies are installed.
Create a new branch from main: `git checkout -b chore/standardize-typography` (run from /projects/sandbox/OSAI).
Run `npm run typecheck` from osai-web/ to confirm baseline passes.
Run `npm run build` from osai-web/ to confirm baseline build passes.
acceptance_criteria: A new branch `chore/standardize-typography` exists and is checked out.
`npm run typecheck` passes with exit code 0.
`npm run build` passes with exit code 0.
findings: Baseline typecheck and build both pass cleanly on main (commit 22ccd63). Dependencies already up to date. No test framework configured.
